enclosure.material: TPU flexible overmold + hard ABS core

firmware.tremor_detection: Accelerometer FFT → peak frequency 4-12Hz = pathological tremor
firmware.compensation: Counter-phase vibration at detected tremor frequency via LRA
firmware.algorithm: Adaptive notch filter at tremor frequency. Phase-locked loop tracks tremor drift. Vibrotactile stimulation at 100-300Hz competes with tremor pathway via proprioceptive interference.
firmware.calibration: Auto-calibrates to individual tremor signature in first 60 seconds

signal_processing.tremor_analysis: FFT 256-point on 1-second window. Peak detection 3-12Hz band. Amplitude threshold >0.5g = treatment trigger.
signal_processing.compensation_waveform: Sinusoidal counter-vibration, phase-inverted to tremor signal
signal_processing.efficacy_monitor: Continuous tremor amplitude tracking. Session log stored locally.

firmware_notes.compensation: Counter-phase vibration at detected tremor frequency via LRA
firmware_notes.algorithm: Adaptive notch filter at tremor frequency. Phase-locked loop tracks tremor drift. Vibrotactile stimulation at 100-300Hz competes with tremor pathway via proprioceptive interference.
firmware_notes.calibration: Auto-calibrates to individual tremor signature in first 60 seconds

mcu.description: Xtensa LX7 240MHz, WiFi+BLE, 8MB PSRAM for ML inference

pcb.process: ENIG — RF requires tight impedance control

firmware.algorithm: Range-Doppler processing. Fall detection via sudden velocity spike + absence of periodic breathing motion post-event. Gait analysis via cadence extraction.
firmware.ml_model: CNN trained on radar signatures of normal gait vs fall events. <200KB model.
firmware.alert: BLE to phone + optional 4G via SIM800L module

signal_processing.fmcw_processing: FFT on I/Q samples → range profile → Doppler processing → micro-Doppler spectrogram
signal_processing.fall_detection: Threshold: velocity > 1.5m/s + horizontal displacement + cessation of periodic motion for >5s
signal_processing.breathing_monitor: 0.1-0.5Hz chest movement extraction from static radar return

mcu.description: Cortex-M0+ — sufficient for thermal control PID loop

thermal_elements.function: H-bridge motor driver for TEC control

firmware.algorithm: PID thermal control loop. Setpoint ±0.5°C accuracy. Ramp rate 1°C/min.
firmware.safety: Hardware cutoff at 42°C skin surface. Redundant thermistors.

firmware.intensity_mt: 0.1-2.0 mT field strength at skin surface
firmware.safety: Auto-shutoff at 40C skin temp. Max 20min session. 4hr lockout.
firmware.algorithm: PEMF protocol library: bone healing (75Hz), pain (10Hz), sleep (delta 0.5-4Hz), inflammation (50Hz)

signal_processing.field_verification: Magnetometer feedback loop confirms field strength within 5%
signal_processing.thermal_monitor: PID temperature controller limits coil current if skin temp exceeds 38C

mcu.description: Cortex-M7 480MHz — needed for real-time ultrasound processing

pcb.process: ENIG — high frequency requires controlled impedance

firmware.safety: BNR verification at startup. Thermal index monitoring. Max 10min continuous.
firmware.algorithm: Pulse-echo time-of-flight for distance measurement. Doppler shift for flow detection.

signal_processing.tx_waveform: DDS sine generation, 8-cycle bursts at PRF 1-10kHz
signal_processing.rx_processing: TGC amplification, bandpass filter, envelope detection, log compression
signal_processing.imaging: A-mode: time-domain waveform. No beamforming needed for point-of-care.

mcu.description: ARM Cortex-M0+ 64MHz, low cost, sufficient for LED drive control

sensors.function: Ambient light sensor — dark adaptation check

firmware.safety: Max 20min session. Eye protection warning on startup. Temp cutoff 45C.

signal_processing.dose_calculation: Joules/cm² = Power(W/cm²) × Time(s). Target 4-60 J/cm² depending on condition.
signal_processing.feedback: Photodiode monitors output power, adjusts PWM to maintain calibrated dose
